calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-19-2021 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-21-2021 Continued To Dec-15-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Oct-28-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Prove-Up Hearing as to defaulted defendant Katherine L. Devinna.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: K. Dougherty. Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:40 a.m.

Eric Marquez, Esq. appeared for plaintiff JPMorgan Chase Bank, N.A.
Samira Peacock, Associate Vendor Management Analyst for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
Both Mr. Marquez and Ms. Peacock appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defendant Katherine L. Devinna.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Common Counts was filed November 23, 2019, and personally served on defendant Katherine L. Devinna on February 7, 2021.
Default as to defendant Katherine L. Devinna was entered on May 3, 2021.
No DOE defendants were named in plaintiff's complaint.

Plaintiff JPMorgan Chase Bank, N.A. submits the following exhibits for the Court's review:
Exhibit 1: Credit Card Application....................................................ID/EVID
Exhibit 2: Card Member Agreement......................................................ID/EVID
Exhibit 3: Monthly Credit Card Statements.............................................ID/EVID

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff JPMorgan Chase Bank, N.A., and against the defaulted defendant Katherine L. Devinna, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $31,234.46.
Prejudgment Interest - Waived.
Attorney Fees - Waived.
Costs - Waived.

Total - $31,234.46.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Proceedings concluded at 9:49 a.m.
